name: Gradient Print Rectangular Table Cover - Spritz™
description:
Bring the vacation vibes to your party and let your guests escape to a dreamy destination with the Dream Vacation Gradient Print Rectangular Table Cover from Spritz™. This table cover featuring a gradient print provides ample coverage for most standard-sized tables. Whether indoors or outdoors, the dream vacation gradient print rectangular table cover from Spritz™ provides a hassle-free setup.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
